text:
Artist: &FRIENDS
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Thu 02:00-04:00
Genre: Global Bass / House / World
Description: From San Diego dreams to Dubai nights, &friends turns global culture into pure dance floor magic. When Black Coffee and Diplo support your sound and Sofi Tukker wants your remixes, you know it's more than just music - it's movement. This worldwide party starter caught Coachella's ear and got 20 million streams by bringing cultures together on the dance floor. No passport needed.

Artist: ¥ØU$UK€ ¥UK1MAT$U
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Wed 00:00-02:00
Description: This is where the vampires will headbang. After fighting brain cancer, Yousuke Yukimatsu reinvented himself as Japan's most fearless genre-bender. Shirtless and drenched in sweat, his sets are raw, emotional, and unpredictable—mixing gabber, trap, techno, and soul into sonic chaos that feels like life itself. This is more than a show; it's a testament to resilience. 🇯🇵

Artist: 30 CENTURY MAN
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Fri 21:15-22:15
Description: The enigmatic producer crafting tomorrow's sound today. 30 CENTURY MAN operates in the space between experimental and dancefloor-ready, creating futuristic compositions that feel both alien and familiar. His rare live appearances are events in themselves.

Artist: ABASC
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Wed 22:30-00:00
Description: Local talent ready to deliver underground electronic energy. Get ready for hypnotic beats and driving rhythms.

Artist: AFTERMATH
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Sun 20:00-21:30
Genre: Afro House
Description: Rooted in Romania's rich musical heritage, AFTERMATH channels Afro house's fresh energy. Born to move souls and fill dancefloors, they've opened for Shimza, Jamiie, and Awen—sharing stages and making crowds lose themselves to the rhythm.

Artist: AKOS
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Fri 20:00-22:00
Genre: Deep House / House / Techno
Description: Akos fell in love with electronic sounds in 2005. He views music as energy, love, and inspiration. His style focuses on deep house, house, and techno—moving crowds with soulful, driving grooves.

Artist: ALDARIS
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Thu 18:00-20:00
Genre: Vinyl Explorer / Deep Grooves
Description: Legend says he's still searching for the perfect groove—record by record, wax story by wax story. Wherever his journey ends, Aldaris has plenty of vinyl adventures to share. Join him.

Artist: ALEX SUPER BEATS
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Sun 22:30-00:00
Description: From Cluj-Napoca to the world, Alex Super Beats (formerly DJ Shiver) has been a driving force in Romania's electronic music scene. With a career spanning over a decade, he's shared stages with global icons and launched his own imprint to push boundaries in electronic music. Expect nothing less than an electrifying journey when he takes over the Castle stage. 🔥

Artist: ALI
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Sat 00:05-01:05
Genre: Indonesian Funk / Arabic Rock
Description: Ever heard Arabic lyrics over Indonesian funk? Ali's cooking up something wild in Jakarta - '70s rock riffs meet Middle Eastern soul, all wrapped in Southeast Asian groove. Three guys turning centuries of cultural fusion into fresh dance floor heat.

Artist: ÂME
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Thu 02:00-05:00
Description: This is electronic music's front line. 20 years ago, Âme decided club music needed more soul and started pushing the boundaries ever since. Today, whether it's Frank's live playing or Kristian's surgical mixing, Âme don't just read dancefloors - they redesign them. Get ready for a legendary performance⚡️

Artist: ANAÏS B2B HOAX + PVC
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sat 03:00-04:00
Description: Fresh out the gate in Bristol, Anaïs already has Glastonbury, Boomtown, and Rampage eating from her palm. Her secret weapon? Raw jungle energy meets surgical precision behind the decks. Catch her before she outgrows those underground bunkers for festival main stages. // When Hoax drops a tune, even the underground veterans stop and listen. Piano skills meet bass addiction in this Bristol lab rat's productions. Pure dance floor science.

Artist: ANDI MOISESCU
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Fri 22:30-00:00
Description: Description not available

Artist: ANDI MOISESCU
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Fri 22:30-00:00
Description: From TV screens to festival stages, Romania's beloved entertainer brings his charismatic energy to the decks. ANDI MOISESCU traded hosting duties for house music, proving that good vibes translate across all mediums. When one of Romania's most recognizable faces gets behind the decks, magic happens.

Artist: ANDRA ANDRIUCĂ
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Sun 15:00-16:00
Genre: Pop / Folk
Description: From Iași to Electric Castle, Andra Andriucă writes songs that feel like heart-to-hearts with your best friend. Backed by her band, she blends indie vibes with pop-rock energy for tracks that hit you right in the feels. Honest music for messy lives—don't miss her set! 🎸

Artist: ANFISA LETYAGO
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Fri 02:30-04:30
Genre: Techno
Description: Anfisa Letyago's journey is as extraordinary as her sets. With Carl Cox as a fan, her hypnotic techno commands your attention without begging for it. When she's in the booth, you can't help but just surrender to the groove. ⚡️

Artist: ARAPU
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sat 07:30-11:00
Genre: House / Techno / Experimental
Description: Arapu, a certified treasure in Bucharest's underground, has produced records since 2011 and brings seductive playfulness to his straightforward, bass-driven sets. His discography blends drones, field recordings, and bass rumble, amplifying good mood across clubs and releases on his Liniar label.

Artist: ARTEMAS
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Fri 19:30-20:30
Genre: Alt-Pop / Dark-Pop
Description: Oxford's finest sad boy with a knack for turning emotions into bangers. The guy who makes heartbreak sound cool, blending alternative pop, dark wave, and R&B. With Gold and Platinum hits like "If U Think I'm Pretty" and "I Like the Way You Kiss Me," Artemas crafts moody soundscapes that hit you right in the feels.

Artist: ATTIC
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Thu 15:00-16:00
Description: Say you don’t know much about

Artist: ATTIC
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Thu 15:00-16:00
Description: Local selector digging deep for the perfect groove. Expect house, disco, and electronic gems that move the soul.

Artist: BAD NERVES
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Thu 19:40-20:40
Genre: Garage Punk / Power Pop
Description: Essex boys making punk rock dangerous again. Think Ramones-meet-Buzzcocks in a 21st century speed blender. Bad Nerves pack more hooks in two minutes than most bands manage in a whole album. Bad Nerves are what happens when punk's original fire meets modern production. Come lose your voice screaming along. ⚡️

Artist: BAKAYAN
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Sat 22:00-00:00
Description: Guitar kid turned electronic wizard, Bákayan brings something different to Berlin's scene. Mixing his Southeast Asian roots with raw emotion, he makes dance music that hits differently. Part melody, part feeling, pure dance floor magic.

Artist: BENJA
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Thu 04:00-06:00
Genre: Electronic
Description: The producer who turns tango into techno. Benja's tracks are like sonic postcards from a future where South America rules the dancefloor. Expect swirling synths, tribal rhythms, and enough emotion to make even the toughest ravers shed a tear. Don't forget your passport. ✈️

Artist: BENZ
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Fri 16:00-18:00
Genre: Afrohouse
Description: Benz is a Tunisian DJ drawing from African and Arab heritage—rich rhythms and percussions transformed into energetic, soulful afrohouse sets that bridge past and present, creating immersive dancefloor experiences.

Artist: BIANCA OANCE
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sat 18:00-20:00
Description: Romanian artist bringing fresh electronic energy. Expect house, pop, and dance sounds that connect with the crowd.

Artist: BICEP
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sun 23:45-01:15
Description: From Belfast bedroom DJs to electronic music royalty, Bicep flex hard. Masters of turning dance music into pure emotion, they've got a black belt in making crowds lose their minds. Get ready to feel something real 💪

Artist: BILA
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sat 23:00-01:00
Description: A discreet presence in electronic music, Bilǎ brings a well-balanced technical mixing approach. His productions are a nexus of classic and new sounds, creating refined, danceable experiences.

Artist: BLANILLA B2B MISSILE
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sat 02:00-04:00
Description: Titus Carole, the "electronica droid," has traversed genres since 2004. With versatile mixing skills and an eclectic sound selection—ranging from 4/4 beats to broken beats—he crafts good mood music that swings between mellow grooves and high-energy DJ sets.

Artist: BOEBECK
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Sat 17:30-18:20
Genre: Indie Pop
Description: Boebeck is a female-led new wave indie band from Hungary that's been turning heads across Europe. Their upcoming EP, Evil Under the Sun (2025), promises more of their signature blend of dreamy rock harmonies and poetic lyricism. Whether you're a fan of indie nostalgia or cutting-edge sounds, Boebeck is here to steal your heart at Electric Castle. 🌟

Artist: BOGDAN MALAELE
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sat 16:00-17:00
Genre: Comedy / DJ
Description: Comedian, gamer, father, lover—and in his own words, the best DJ in the EU—Bogdan Malaele brings humor and heartfelt vibes to every performance.

Artist: BON ENTENDEUR
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Sat 00:30-02:30
Genre: French Samples / Nu-Disco
Description: Two music obsessives dropping vintage voice samples over fresh beats, turning 70s gems into modern dance floor gold. 70 million streams can't be wrong. Merging classic French voices with cutting-edge production, this duo takes packed halls on a journey between decades.

Artist: BOSQUITO
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Sat 19:30-20:30
Genre: Rock / Balkan / Gypsy Punk
Description: 25 years of turning Romanian rock into pure fire. From gypsy punk to symphonic ballads, Bosquito blend Balkan spirit with rock'n'roll heart. This anniversary show? Pure history in the making 🔥

Artist: BRÓDY & DR.PANDA
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Fri 01:30-03:30
Description: Romanian duo bringing genre-blending electronic sounds. Expect house, techno, and experimental beats that surprise and delight.

Artist: BRUTALISMUS 3000
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sat 23:30-00:30
Genre: Hardcore / Techno
Description: Berlin's noisiest love story - where gabber meets punk, hardstyle meets industrial, and chaos meets genius. The soundtrack to a dystopian warehouse rave you never want to leave. He builds sonic weapons, she screams in multiple languages. Together, they're reinventing rave culture for a generation that needs it more than ever. ⚡️

Artist: BULLY
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Fri 03:30-05:30
Genre: Big Beat / Breakbeat / Hip-Hop / World Music
Description: Since 2000, Bully has curated genre-blending journeys—from funk grooves and house to obscure hip-hop and world music. Having played virtually every major venue in Romania and shared stages with legends like Qbert and Freestylers, his vinyl and tape collecting fuels masterful, storytelling sets that celebrate rhythm and melody.

Artist: CALINACHO
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Thu 01:00-01:30
Genre: Pop / Trap
Description: Calinacho is redefining Romanian trap with his genre-blending sound and heartfelt lyrics. With tracks like "Seara Mea" and "Lipsa Ta" from his acclaimed album Ai Grijă, he's established himself as a leading voice in Romanian R&B. Whether collaborating with big names or dropping solo hits, Calinacho brings authenticity to every performance. At Electric Castle, expect an intimate yet electrifying set from this rising star.

Artist: CALLY
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sun 14:00-17:00
Genre: Minimal / Techno
Description: Hailing from Craiova, Romania, caLLy (real name Dragos Gabriel Dumitru) is a forward-thinking DJ and producer whose refined sound has earned him a respected place in the global underground scene. Known for his deep, hypnotic grooves and precise minimal aesthetic, caLLy brings a unique identity to both his productions and DJ sets. His music has been released on labels such as only300, Fear of Flying, Brouqade, Rora, Fizical, Neostrictly, Soulsity, Inwave, and The Rabbit Hole. Featured on influential compilations like Cocoon Green & Blue (mixed by Tobi Neumann) and Cocoon Heroes (mixed by Adam Beyer & Dorian Paic), caLLy continues to evolve, delivering timeless sets and productions that resonate deeply on the dancefloor.

Artist: CALYX
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Sun 19:00-20:00 (Hosted by GQ)
Genre: Drum & Bass
Description: Half of the legendary Calyx & TeeBee duo, Calyx brings decades of technical precision to the decks. His solo sets showcase the darker, more technical side of drum & bass—surgical beats that hit harder than a freight train.

Artist: CAMI LAYÉ OKÚN
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Fri 22:00-00:00
Genre: Tropical Disco / Funk / Afro-Latin
Description: Cami Layé Okún unlocks Cuban disco secrets and drops Amazonian funk bombs. Her vinyl bag's loaded with tropical treasures most DJs can't even name. This is how party music should feel.

Artist: CAP
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Thu 01:00-04:00
Genre: Minimal / Techno / Electro / Deep House
Description: Cap has made a name worldwide for surgical-smooth mixing, spot-on selection, and tireless dedication. His residencies at Club Guesthouse, Sunwaves Festival, and Resolute anchor his reputation as a tastemaker. Cap's tastefully reduced grooves, progressive narratives, and technical mixing reveal a DJ in tune with today's electronic music world, crafting explorations that ignite dance floors.

Artist: CARI CARI
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Sat 20:30-21:30
Genre: Indie Rock / Blues
Description: Austria's desert rock duo bringing psychedelic storms to Electric Castle. The band that turns Austrian forests into American deserts. Cari Cari's music is a roadtrip through the wildest corners of your mind, fueled by distortion and wanderlust. Prepare for a set that'll make you question reality... and maybe buy a motorcycle. 🏍️

Artist: CASABLANCA DRIVERS
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Sat 22:15-23:15
Description: French indie duo from Corsica bringing garage rock meets dirty bouncy pop to the Castle. Nicolas Paoletti and Alexandre Diani have been evolving their sound since 2012, and their Paris-honed energy is about to electrify Transylvania. From Mediterranean shores to Romanian grounds.

Artist: CC:DISCO!
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Sun 23:00-00:30
Genre: Disco / House
Description: The DJ who proves that disco never died, it just moved Down Under. CC:DISCO!'s selections are like a masterclass in feel-good music, from rare groove gems to modern club bangers. Get ready for a set that'll make your parents jealous they missed the 70s at the Castle. 🎶

Artist: CHARLIE B2B MIHIGH
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sun 05:00-08:00
Description: Charlie is a deep selector whose studio work complements his DJing, offering unique moments reflective of himself. With a trove of unreleased works, his complex, peculiar sound always keeps groove at the forefront, making him a secret weapon at festivals and events across Europe. // Mihigh defines his sound through a uniquely evolving storytelling style. Drawing from profound minimal and techno influences, he combines new and old to craft obscure, hypnotic grooves. Founder of Midi Records Romania, he champions quality over quantity.

Artist: CHIRTY
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sat 14:00-16:00
Genre: Bass / Footwork / Garage
Description: Romanian selector now in Rotterdam's scene, Chirty weaves bass, footwork, garage, and hybrid grooves. She's played Poing, Perron, Weelde, Sexyland, Mysteryland, and Oranjebitter—and is expanding into Romania, Switzerland, and the UK.

Artist: CHRISTIAN AB
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sun 23:00-02:00
Genre: Vinyl / Electronic / Eclectic
Description: Part of Berlin's vinyl-loving community, Christian AB's selections do the talking. With a passion for unearthing forgotten gems within electronic music and beyond, his distinctive sound breaks down club music barriers, delighting audiences with unexpected twists and turns and bringing a playful energy that cements his reputation as a must-see DJ.

Artist: CHRISTIAN THOMSON
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sat 20:15-21:15
Description: Local talent delivering carefully curated electronic sounds. Expect house and techno mixed with technical precision.

Artist: CHRISTINE RENÉE
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Thu 03:00-05:00
Genre: House / Soulful
Description: Berlin's techno enchantress bringing dark magic to Transylvania. Christine Renée's sets are a masterclass in hypnotic grooves, blending minimal techno with acid-tinged warehouse vibes. She's already conquered Berghain - now it's time to show Electric Castle why she's Germany's best-kept secret. 🖤

Artist: CIREȘAN
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Fri 18:00-19:00
Genre: Pop / Folk
Description: Funky beats? Check. Retro 80s vibes? Check. Cireșan knows how to get a crowd moving with his blend of synth-pop and classic rock grooves. If you're into Daft Punk or RHCP, this set is gonna be your jam. All about good vibes and killer hooks. Bring your dancing shoes! 🎤

Artist: CLARAA
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Fri 22:00-23:30 (Moblack records takeover)
Genre: Afro-House / Melodic Techno
Description: When CLARAA steps up, genres blur beautifully. Think afro-house grooves dancing with melodic techno peaks, served with Parisian flair and Barcelona spirit. Her sets work magic in both underground bunkers and beachfront superclubs.

Artist: COOL CATS
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Thu 15:00-16:30
Genre: House / Disco / Techno
Description: Navigating seamlessly from House to Disco and back to Techno, Andruw & Vlint.on emerge as two up-and-coming DJs from Romania's vibrant underground scene. Their dance-centric energy and sets draw inspiration from indie dance, italo disco, dark disco, progressive, trance, EBM, and house—evoking the spirit of the 70s, 80s, and 90s.

Artist: CORVIN & BUNIKU
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Thu 22:00-00:00
Genre: Eclectic / DJ Duo
Description: Corvin & BUNIKU are a Romanian duo whose style eludes definition—an eclectic roller coaster through contrasting genres and unlikely mix-matches, with a definitely humorous edge.

Artist: CUC
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Fri 14:00-16:00
Genre: Deep House
Description: CUC carves sound from wax. Deep house, ambient textures, jazz-infused grooves—always vinyl, always warm. When he's not playing festivals, you'll find him at the record café in Cluj that shares the name (@cuc.space), where the crackle of vinyl blends with the hum of conversation.

Artist: CULTATUM
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Thu 16:30-18:00
Genre: Melodic House
Description: Former DJ and current graphic designer, cultatum returns to music with renewed passion. Known for melodic storytelling and groovy basslines, his sets take the crowd on a rhythmic, uplifting journey—sharing energy he's held back for far too long.

Artist: CULTURE SHOCK
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Sat 19:45-21:00
Genre: Drum & Bass
Description: Culture Shock Drum & Bass / Jungle Hospital Records legends bringing two decades of pure liquid vibes and surgical basslines. Culture Shock's anthems have soundtracked countless raves, blending soulful melodies with dancefloor devastation. When they drop, crowds know they're in for something special.

Artist: D'JHU
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sun 16:00-18:00
Description: Playing since 2008, D'Jhu thrives on genre-blending. Never shows up with a prepared lesson—he adapts in real time to the crowd's vibe, tossing various styles that tickle the ears.

Artist: DAN ANDREI
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Fri 01:00-04:00
Genre: House / Tech House / Groove
Description: Dan Andrei is an established figure known for deep, raw track selections with a stripped-back aesthetic. His groovy basslines and blissful meanders captivate audiences, while live sets showcase his powerful weaving of tracks into unforgettable experiences.

Artist: DAR DISKU
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sat 22:00-00:00
Genre: Arabic Fusion / Electronic
Description: Record label, DJ collective, and live project celebrating music from Arabia and beyond. Founded by Mazen Almaskati and Vish M, DAR DISKU ("home of the disco" in Arabic) explores Middle Eastern and Asian sounds blended with contemporary electronic music. From 1970s Egyptian inspiration to modern Castle magic.

Artist: DEAN KLOOGE
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Thu 15:00-15:55
Genre: Alternative / Indie
Description: Dean Klooge is bringing raw alt-rock energy straight outta Cluj-Napoca. No frills, no fluff—Dean Klooge delivers alternative rock with punk vibes and a lot of heart. Their live shows are loud, chaotic (in the best way), and packed with tracks that'll stick in your head long after the festival ends. Don't miss 'em! 🔥

Artist: DECKSTER
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Sun 17:00-18:00
Genre: Bass Music / DnB / Reggae
Description: From soulful jazz to hardcore breaks and dub to reggae, Deckster's sets showcase the history and culture of bass music—featuring playful DnB rhythms, 140 BPM bass blasts, and everything in between.

Artist: DEER JADE
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Thu 00:00-02:00
Genre: House / Indie Electronica
Description: Ten cities before 22, and now Deer Jade's bringing that wild energy to dance floors worldwide. Her sets feel like a warm hug and a rocket launch at the same time. The critics love her, but it's the smiles in the crowd that tell the real story.

Artist: DEGS
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Wed 23:30-01:15 (REEL PARTY BY BT)
Genre: MC / Rap / Vocals
Description: Some MCs rap, others sing - Degs does both with surgical precision. Switching between rapid-fire bars and soulful hooks, he just makes it look effortless. From freestyle heat on Hospital classics to creating summer classics, he's pure fire.

Artist: DEGS
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sat 01:00-02:00
Genre: MC / Rap / Vocals
Description: Some MCs rap, others sing - Degs does both with surgical precision. Switching between rapid-fire bars and soulful hooks, he just makes it look effortless. From freestyle heat on Hospital classics to creating summer classics, he's pure fire.

Artist: DEKI ALEM
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Wed 20:30-21:30
Genre: Hip-Hop / Drum & Bass
Description: Twin brothers from Sweden, Deki Alem are rewriting the rules of alternative music. Fusing drum & bass, grunge, and rap into explosive soundscapes, their live shows are pure adrenaline. From opening for Gorillaz to storming Europe's biggest festivals, they're unstoppable. 🔥

Artist: DELIRIC X SILENT STRIKE
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Fri 01:05-02:05
Genre: Hip-Hop
Description: The dream team that elevated Romanian rap to an art form. Deliric spits truth with surgical precision while Silent Strike crafts beats that could score sci-fi films. Together, they're taking the Castle on a journey through Bucharest's concrete jungle and beyond. prepare for lyrical acrobatics over mind-bending production. 🚀

Artist: DENY
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Thu 02:00-03:00
Description: Romanian artist bringing alternative electronic sounds to the Castle. Expect experimental beats with serious attitude.

Artist: DIANA CĂLDĂRARU
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Thu 20:30-21:30
Genre: Pop / Soul
Description: Romania's classical music star with a voice that could shatter glass. Diana Căldăraru blends opera grandeur with pop sensibility, creating a sound that's both majestic and accessible. Her music is like a symphony on a summer evening. 🌟

Artist: DIGITALOVE
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Sat 21:00-23:00
Genre: House / Tech House / Techno / Disco
Description: DigitaLove ignites crowds with electrifying sets that blend house, tech house, techno, and disco at festivals like Untold, Electric Castle, Jazz in the Park, and TIFF.

Artist: DIMITRI'S BATS
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sat 15:00-16:00
Genre: Post-Punk / Garage Rock
Description: Transylvania's own gothic post-punk heroes. Dimitri's Bats channel the spirit of Joy Division and The Cure, with a distinctly Romanian twist. Their brooding melodies and haunting vocals will make even the most jaded hipsters remember why they fell in love with rock. 🦇

Artist: DIRTY SHIRT
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sun 17:00-18:00
Genre: Folk Metal / Hardcore
Description: They married metal riffs with folk melodies when everyone said it couldn't work. Now, 30 years later, Dirty Shirt will celebrate at the Castle a legacy of making metal fans dance to traditional flutes. Eastern Europe's wildest experiment turned hardcore-metal and folk instruments into pure party fuel. Three decades strong, still breaking rules 🔥

Artist: DISKO ANKSYETE (CORINA SUCAROV)
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Wed 00:00-02:00
Description: Corina Sucarov of +SHE+ fronts Disko Anksyete—a DJ series exploring the beauty in darkness. Her sets weave darkwave, post-punk, new wave, and dark disco into a spellbinding rhythm inspired by New Order, Depeche Mode, Bauhaus, and more.

Artist: DJ CRISTACHE
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sun 19:00-20:30
Genre: Elegant Nightlife / Vinyl
Description: Alex Cristache lives a double life—lawyer by day, Bucharest's most sought-after elegant nightlife DJ by night. With an impressive vinyl collection, he's shaped atmospheres at Scenario, Casa Mița Biciclista, Summer Well, and Nostalgia.

Artist: DJ DIANA SAR
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Fri 19:00-20:30
Genre: Fresh / Dynamic House
Description: Actress, influencer, and DJ, Diana Sar brings an authentic, high-energy vibe. Her music sets are fresh, dynamic, and perfectly tailored to every type of crowd.

Artist: DJ HEFE
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sat 02:00-04:00
Description: Hefe (Coma member since 2000) spins alternative punk, ska, and hardcore in Club Fire and beyond, while hosting Guerrilla Radio's Domestika and Blackrhino's Vertigo Cultural—bringing raw energy to every set.

Artist: DJ MA-TA
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sun 22:30-00:00
Description: Romania's mother figure behind the decks—serving straight-to-jail type beats with a signature boldness.

Artist: DJ OPTIK
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Sat 05:00-07:00
Description: Began in 5th grade throwing parties and building his high-school radio station; from 1996 on Radio 21 Ciuc to Radio 21 Bucharest at age 21, he launched Romania's first electronic show "Obsession," won Nights.ro's Best DJ (2008), later moved "Obsession" to Ibiza Global Radio, and co-founded the Double Trouble project/label with Adrian Eftimie—continuously shaping Romania's electronic legacy.

Artist: DJ SAUCE
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Thu 20:00-21:30
Genre: Eclectic Hip-Hop–inspired
Description: Sauce's style breaks the mold—an eclectic mix spanning old-school hip-hop roots to modern genres. He crafts "old to new" shows that seamlessly traverse styles, thanks to hip-hop's versatility as the "mother genre."

Artist: DJ SPINNA
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Wed 21:00-23:00
Genre: Hip-Hop / House / Soul
Description: DJ Spinna's been rocking parties since cassettes were king, blending hip-hop, house, and soul into pure sonic gold. His crates run deeper than the Mariana Trench, from rare groove gems to futuristic beats. With remixes for everyone from De La Soul to Mary J. Blige, DJ Spinna's here to school Transylvania in the art of groove. 🎧

Artist: DJ TENNIS
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Sun 00:30-02:30
Genre: House / Techno
Description: The guy who swapped tennis courts for turntables and never looked back. From booking the legends to becoming one himself. His sound? Life and Death in musical form - melancholy and euphoria wrapped in Italian passion. Like a late-night road trip with no map. 🎾

Artist: DODO
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sat 04:00-06:00
Genre: Multi-genre / Promoter
Description: Dodo is a dynamic and multifaceted force in the music scene, recognized as a DJ, promoter, event organizer, founder of the Make Music Not War music production school in Romania, and booking manager. Since launching his sonic journey in 2010, Dodo has carved out a distinct niche, blending his passion for performance with a flair for curating unforgettable experiences for music lovers.

Artist: DORA GAITANOVICI
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sun 15:25-16:20
Genre: Alt-Rock / Folk-Pop

Artist: LIZZ
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sat 18:00-21:00

Description: LIZZ (real name Petre Vali) is a DJ and producer originally from Buzău, now based in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. He discovered electronic music at the age of 15 and has since developed a deep passion for mixing and producing, crafting a personal style rooted in subtlety, rhythm, and emotion. LIZZ has released music on respected labels such as Playedby, East Enders, Atipic, and Rawax. In 2015, he embarked on his first international tour across North America and Australia, followed by a South American tour in 2016. Among his most notable works are Chapter 1 and Chapter 2 — two conceptual EPs released on Playedby, intended to tell a story and reflect a continuous artistic evolution. Since 2018, LIZZ has been part of the Sunrise agency, performing at major festivals like Sunwaves, Mioritmic, and Electric Castle. He's brought his sound to cities and capitals across Europe and beyond, including Berlin, Paris, London, Rome, Barcelona, Zurich, as well as Peru, Colombia, Guatemala, Vancouver, Toronto, and Montreal. LIZZ's sound is ever-evolving — shifting seamlessly between deep minimal textures, micro-house, darker shades of electronic music, and high-energy dancefloor-oriented rhythms. In recent years, his musical direction has been leaning more towards groovy, hypnotic techno infused with electro influences, embracing a deeper and more intense aesthetic. At the core of his sets and productions lies a strong sense of groove — whether introspective or powerful, his music retains a distinct identity that continues to expand and transform.

As the first Romanian artist to perform at Glastonbury, Mihail has proven that his music transcends borders. At Electric Castle, expect a set that's both deeply personal and universally resonant. 🌙

Artist: MIHNEA ROG
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sat 12:00-15:00
Genre: House / Techno / Deep
Description: Mihnea Rog, a recent apparition in the Romanian clubbing scene, is climbing the ranks with a dedicated work ethic. His selection and production have put him under the spotlight, benefiting from a meticulous approach to discovering new music.

Artist: MINDTHEGAP TRIO
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Fri 16:30-17:30
Genre: Jazz / Fusion
Description: The band that turns jazz into a thrilling adventure. Mindthegap Trio's music is like a rollercoaster ride through the history of jazz, from swing to free improvisation. Prepare for a set that'll make you question everything you thought you knew about jazz... and maybe even learn something new. 🎺

Artist: MIU
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Wed 20:00-22:30
Genre: House / UK Garage
Description: MIU's style is rooted in house music. His DJ sets fuse classic '90s warehouse beats with old-school chord stabs, catchy vocal cuts, and a touch of UK garage. A longtime percussion lover, expect snappy rhythms and unstoppable grooves that get you moving.

Artist: MOBLACK
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Fri 04:30-07:00 (Moblack records takeover)
Genre: Afro House / Cultural Fusion
Description: From Naples to Ghana, MoBlack turned cultural fusion into dancefloor gold. The fashion guru who built Afro House's future while honoring its roots, creating a label that feels more like a movement. Turning local voices into global anthems ⚡️

Artist: MOONLIGHT BREAKFAST
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Thu 18:05-19:00
Genre: Dream Pop / Indie
Description: The band that proves Romania can do neo-soul with the best of them. Moonlight Breakfast's sound is what would happen if Amy Winehouse jammed with Morcheeba in a Bucharest basement. Their silky vocals will transport you to a smoky 60s jazz club... in space. 🌙

Artist: MURI
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Thu 19:30-22:00
Genre: Eclectic / House
Description: Trained as a structural engineer, MURI blends the precision of his profession with the art of music. His sets reflect this harmony—meticulous yet expressive, technical yet emotive.

Artist: MUSAI
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Sat 16:00-18:00
Description: Local artist channeling creative electronic energy. Expect ambient, house, and experimental sounds that inspire.

Artist: MUSSPELL
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Sun 16:30-17:30
Genre: Indie / Alternative
Description: Dreamy, moody, and straight out of Cluj, Musspell mixes northern vibes with ethereal dream-pop. Think synths, guitars, live drums, and female vocals weaving in and out like a conversation. Perfect for a chill-out session under the stars.

Artist: NASIRI
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Sun 23:30-01:00
Genre: World / Electronic / Middle Eastern
Description: Forget everything you know about electronic music. Nasiri brings centuries-old instruments to the club, creating a sound where Persian soul meets modern groove. When those Middle Eastern melodies float over deep electronic beats, something magical happens.

Artist: NAVALA
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Fri 16:00-18:00
Genre: Latin / Disco / African Funk
Description: NAVALA fuses Latin rhythms, disco motifs, and African percussion into smooth, natural funk grooves. Her sets break cultural barriers—an unforgettable journey through traditional and modern genres.

Artist: NEIL FRANCES
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sun 22:00-23:00
Description: Two guys who turned tape machines into time machines. Neil Frances blends hip-hop, soul, and electronic music into pure joy, turning dancefloors into funk laboratories. Get ready to wear off your sneakers.

Artist: NELU
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Sun 15:30-17:00
Genre: Drum & Bass / Jump-Up
Description: Emerging from Transylvania, Nelu blends minimal with jump-up to create a distinctive drum & bass sound. A rising talent in Romania's underground DnB community, his style quickly captures attention with its unique energy.

Artist: NETSKY B2B NGHTMRE
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Fri 00:30-02:10
Description: Meet drum & bass's golden boy - Two decades of turning festivals upside down, Netsky is the producer who made dancefloor anthems feel like love letters. Whether he's making ravers float or pop fans dance, Netsky's got that rare power to lift spirits through sound ⚡️ // The producer who makes speakers tremble and crowds lose it. From anonymous uploads to festival main stages, NGHTMRE turned bass into an art form. And now, teaming up with drum & bass royalty Netsky, this rare B2B set brings together two of electronic music's most innovative minds. History in the making at the Castle. ⚡️

Artist: NEXUS
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Sat 16:00-17:00
Description: Romanian artist connecting different electronic worlds. Expect house, techno, and ambient sounds that flow seamlessly together.

Artist: NILÜFER YANYA
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sat 20:00-21:00
Genre: Indie Rock / Jazz / Soul
Description: What happens when Nina Simone meets Pixies in a West London bedroom? Nilüfer Yanya answered a question nobody asked, and somehow made everyone's playlists deeper. From classical piano to dark guitar pop, she refuses to pick a lane, mixing indie rock, jazz, and raw soul into something entirely her own. ⚡️

Artist: NITEFREAK
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Fri 02:30-04:30 (Moblack records takeover)
Genre: Afro Tech / Global Bass
Description: The guy who went from selling beats to stealing shows. Nitefreak took Zimbabwe's pulse and turned it into Ibiza gold. These days Black Coffee's spinning his tracks, but he still makes beats like he's got something to prove 🌍

Artist: NOGA EREZ
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Sun 19:35-20:35
Genre: Alt-Pop / Hip-Hop
Description: Castle's favourite troublemaker is back, this time debuting on the Main Stage. The sound? Think alt-pop meets hip-hop meets pure attitude. Noga Erez blends music with raw honesty and turns it into revolution fuel. Get ready for some beautiful chaos. ⚡️

Artist: NOMAD
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Thu 20:00-22:00
Genre: Eclectic Electronic
Description: I'm NOMAD, and for me, music is more than sound—it's connection. A good track isn't just heard; it's felt. I chase rhythms that unite people, tell stories without words, and create moments where music, DJ, and crowd become one.

Artist: NYSS
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sat 23:00-00:00
Genre: Hip-Hop / R&B / Funk
Description: Balancing careers in music and architecture, NYSS blends hip-hop, R&B, and funk into intentionally structured yet free-flowing sets—reflecting deep roots in Bucharest's dance community.

Artist: OCS
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sat 18:20-19:20
Genre: Alternative Rock
Description: Omul cu Șobolani (OCS) has been shaping Romania's alt-rock scene for nearly three decades. Their mix of grunge-inspired riffs and poetic lyrics has made them icons of the genre. Get ready for a live performance that is raw, emotional, and unforgettable.

Artist: OCTO OCTA & ERIS DREW
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Thu 00:00-03:00
Genre: House / Techno
Description: Dance music's power couple bringing transcendent vibes to Transylvania, turning dancefloors into sacred spaces. Octo Octa & Eris Drew craft euphoric house and breakbeat journeys, infused with spiritual energy and pure love. Their B2B sets are legendary - prepare for a masterclass in rave ecstasy. 💖

Artist: OKTOPUS
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Thu 18:00-20:00
Genre: House
Description: A dedicated house music selector—pure grooves, no frills.

Artist: OLAF
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sat 17:00-18:30
Genre: Disco
Description: Olaf, the metalhead who loves disco, brings a unique fusion of heavy roots and classic grooves—turning disco music into a head-banging experience.

Artist: OM LA LUNĂ
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Fri 18:15-19:15
Genre: Indie Rock / Alternative
Description: With poetic lyrics that feel like diary entries and melodies that linger long after the last note, they've redefined Romania's indie-folk scene. Born from Doru Pușcașu's raw acoustic project, their sound now blends delicate storytelling with cinematic intensity. At the Castle, expect goosebumps, singalongs, and maybe even a tear or two.

Artist: ON THE BLOCK DJ SET
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Thu 03:00-04:30
Genre: Hip-Hop
Description: Ever since their first 2016 epic party in Bucharest, ON THE BLOCK has been selling out events across the country, bringing the vibe of the hottest international urban parties to Romania. 8 years later, the OTB community has only grown bigger. If not the biggest in RO. 🎧

Artist: OSCAR
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Thu 02:20-02:50
Genre: Hip-Hop / Trap
Description: From talent show prodigy to Romanian trap royalty, Oscar has carved his own path in the music industry. With a unique blend of soulful lyrics and hard-hitting beats, Oscar's live performances are unforgettable. Electric Castle is about to witness his rise to the next level. 🎤

Artist: OUCH COLLECTIVE
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sun 17:00-19:00
Genre: Hip-Hop / Multi-genre
Description: Ouch Collective is a dynamic platform dedicated to amplifying womxn voices across the global music spectrum. Trailblazing hip-hop culture—old-school to contemporary—Ouch supports and spotlights womxn artists, creating a global nexus of DJs, insiders, and fans united by a love for music and creative expression.

Artist: PANJABI HIT SQUAD
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Fri 00:00-01:30
Genre: Hip-Hop / Bhangra / Global
Description: If you hear the crowd going wild from across the festival grounds, chances are it's Panjabi Hit Squad doing their thing. Mixing familiar bangers with red-hot global beats, Rav & Dee turn first-time listeners into instant fans. Missing this set? Don't even think about it.

Artist: PAUL K
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sat 15:00-18:00
Genre: Experimental / Ambient / Electronic
Description: Based in Transylvania, Paul K views music as a mirror to the human soul—transcending mortality through mystical, introspective, and profound sounds. Blending playing and production seamlessly, he experiments in the studio, refining a distinctive sonic imprint in limitless shapes and forms.

Artist: PAULVLJ
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sun 00:00-02:00
Genre: Eclectic Mix
Description: Blending music genres with internet references discovered after hours of doomscrolling, PAULVLJ's chaotic-yet-cohesive sets resemble a hearty musical stew—combining various styles into a uniquely satisfying listening experience.

Artist: PAUZA
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Sat 00:00-02:00
Genre: Electronic / Organic House
Description: A sound that's equal parts Havana street party and Berlin warehouse rave. PAUZA crafts deep, hypnotic grooves that bridge continents, mixing ancestral Cuban sounds with futuristic textures, now bringing tropical heat to Transylvania. Get ready for a set that'll make you question why salsa and techno were ever separate. 🌴

Artist: PIXAR STELAR
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Wed 18:00-20:00
Description: Romanian artist bringing eclectic electronic vibes to the Castle. Expect a diverse mix that'll keep you moving.

Artist: PRASLEA
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sun 02:00-05:00
Genre: Techno / House / Experimental
Description: Praslea is a groundbreaking character in the club scene, collaborating with Raresh, El Cezere, and Kozo on projects like Afumați and running the Understand label. Inspired by Thomas Melchior, Scott Ferguson, Tobias Freund, Cabanne, Global Communication, Philip Glass, and Stephan Mincus, his releases include Jurnal de bord ([a:rpia:r]) and Circoloco @ DC10 Anniversary (Moon Harbour). A new Afumați release on Jesus Loved You is forthcoming.

Artist: PRICHINDEL
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sat 21:00-23:00
Genre: House / Techno / Minimal
Description: Cătălin Prichindel is a Romanian DJ and producer known for his groovy electronic style. A forerunner of Romania's new wave, he co-founded Tonomat Records and consistently delivers joyful energy and crowd-connecting performances.

Artist: PRIKU
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sat 01:00-04:00
Genre: House / Tech House
Description: Adrian Niculae a.k.a. Priku established himself as a hardworking, passionate music creator. A Sunrise Booking member since 2007, he rose to big gigs through notable Sunwaves performances and continues to deliver dynamic house and tech house sets.

Artist: PUIU
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Fri 20:00-22:00
Genre: Funk / Groove
Description: Vinyl spinnin', tune diggin', good mood bringin'—this fun-lovin' criminal serves up grooves that put you in a great mood.

Artist: QUEENS OF THE STONE AGE
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Fri 22:50-00:05
Genre: Rock
Description: Desert-born, chaos-driven, and impossible to pin down - QOTSA are rock's ultimate shape-shifters. Two decades of heavy riffs and heavier grooves, always evolving, never settling 🌵

Artist: QUEST
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Thu 04:00-07:00
Genre: Techno / EBM / Experimental
Description: Quest, class of 1992, influenced by the Alien Army and by the special technique of shadowboxing... Head of La Nota Del Diablo. Like the Beast, he goes by many names: Diabolus in musica (devil in music), the devil's interval, the tritone, the triad, and the flatted fifth. As its Latin moniker suggests, it's an evil-sounding combination of notes designed to create a chilling or foreboding atmosphere—an atmosphere that characterizes his sets showcasing a vast collection of unearthed, genre-bending gems ranging across the electronic spectrum from outré techno to electro to EBM.

Artist: RAOUL
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Wed 17:00-19:00
Genre: Funk / Disco / Dance Grooves
Description: From SoundSquad in Cluj-Napoca, Raoul spreads good vibes—organizing events and DJing with an eclectic mix of funk, disco, and dancey grooves to soundtrack sunny hangouts and keep you moving all day long.

Artist: RAVA
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Thu 01:40-02:10
Genre: Trap
Description: One of Romania's hottest trap stars, Rava has been dominating the scene with his infectious hooks and raw lyrics. With millions of streams and sold-out shows across the country, Rava is a name you can't miss if you're in for an iconic urban performance. At Electric Castle, expect energy and tracks that will have the crowd bouncing all night. 🔥

Artist: REFUSED
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Thu 21:20-22:20
Genre: Hardcore Punk
Description: Born from Umeå's underground scene, rejected its rules, then rewrote them entirely. These Swedish rebels turned punk inside out, broke up, and came back stronger. That's music that burns brighter than rules. 🔥

Artist: RHEM
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Sun 21:30-23:30 (live)
Genre: Deep House / Tech House
Description: Rhem is a Bucharest-based DJ/producer and LiveAct artist with 12+ years' experience. His lush, melodic, and energetic style fuses deep house and tech house with beautiful vocals. In 2022 he launched a LiveAct project blending controllers, modular synths, and drums—drawing on Middle Eastern musical culture to craft organic, hypnotic performances.

Artist: RÓISÍN MURPHY
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Fri 21:10-22:10
Genre: Art Pop / Electronic
Description: Ireland's avant-pop queen who refuses to play by the rules. From Moloko's dance hits to solo experimentation, Róisín Murphy makes art you can dance to. Part fashion icon, part musical shapeshifter, wholly impossible to ignore. The costumes are wild, the moves are wilder, the music is wildest. Don't miss this. 👑

Artist: ROMANSOFF
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Thu 21:30-00:00
Genre: Underground Club / Vinyl
Description: Tudor Gheorghe (Romansoff) is a Bucharest DJ/producer and vinyl collector with 13+ years on the capital's underground club scene. Versatile and creative, he's released on Raw Tools, Mork, Creme Organization, and Les Yeux Orange, and regularly headlines Bucharest's top nights.

Artist: ROMARE
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sun 22:00-00:00
Genre: Jazz House / Collage / Dance
Description: What happens when you mix a drummer's groove with a crate digger's obsession? Meet Romare, the sonic collagist turning dusty vinyl into fresh dance floor gold. Behind the decks, old records become fresh beats, jazz meets club culture, and every track tells a story. DJ Mag's Album of the Year? Just the beginning.

Artist: ROSA PISTOLA
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sat 00:00-02:00
Genre: Reggaeton / Latin Club
Description: Mexico City's reggaeton rebel bringing perreo heat to Transylvania. Rosa Pistola blends Latin rhythms with punk attitude and enough bass to shake the Castle walls. Rosa Pistola's selections bridge the gap between dembow rhythms and industrial techno, creating a sound that's equal parts sexy and confrontational. Prepare for the wildest workout of your life. No gym membership required. 🔥

Artist: RUDIMΞNTAL
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Sat 21:00-22:00
Genre: Drum & Bass / Pop
Description: From pirate radio to platinum records, Rudimental wrote the blueprint for festival-sized drum & bass. Grammy nominees and chart-toppers who blend soul, reggae and electronic beats, these BRIT Award winners will deliver anthems, chaos, and most likely your new summer soundtrack. ⚡️

Artist: S!RENE
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sat 00:00-02:00
Genre: Amapiano / Afro-Funk / Gospel
Description: Young blood with an old soul - that's S!RENE for you. Grew up on gospel, fell in love with everything from African funk to amapiano, and now he's cooking up something entirely new. Europe's already hooked, Asia's gone wild, you're next.

Artist: SAMBO
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Thu 14:00-15:00 (GLO Contest Winner)
Genre: House
Description: Co-founder of Discognito label, Sambo blends energetic house grooves and curates quality underground sounds. His 2023 return to classic house has earned support from Jamie Jones, Fleur Shore, and others—putting him on the international radar.

Artist: SCATTERBRAIN
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Fri 14:00-15:30
Genre: Drum & Bass
Description: Andrei Duruș (Scatterbrain) is a Romanian drum & bass producer/DJ with releases on Galacy, Fokuz, and DeVice. Influenced by Technimatic, Netsky, and Calibre, he debuted internationally in Prague in 2024 and has performed at iconic Romanian venues like Arenele Romane and Club Quantic. His technical precision and creativity promise an exciting future.

Artist: SHAGGY
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Sun 21:10-22:10
Genre: Reggae / Dancehall
Description: Mr. Boombastic himself, serving certified bangers since the 90s. From Kingston to global domination, Shaggy's got that rare superpower of making hits feel like house parties. Two decades later, he's still making crowds lose control 🔥

Artist: SHANTI CELESTE
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sun 00:00-02:00
Genre: House / Techno / Euphoria
Description: Hearing Shanti Celeste play is like watching colors mix in real time. She floats between sunny house euphoria and dark techno thunder like it's nothing. Her tracks breathe atmosphere, her sets build pure magic, and when those airy vocals hit - game over. Dance floor therapy at its finest.

Artist: SHIMI
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sun 18:00-20:00
Genre: Old-School Rap / DJ / Turntablist
Description: Co-founder of Made from Scratch crew and scratch teacher at OWPN Academy, Shimi has backed national MCs since 2008. He's shared stages with Mobb Deep, Jeru the Damaja, Dope DOD, Wilkinson, Stanton Warriors, JFB, DJ Undoo, K-Lu, Sauce, and many more. His sets build from old-school rap into high-BPM drum'n'bass or drift into funk, house, and UKG, adapting to venue, crowd, and energy.

Artist: SHURUBEL
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Sun 16:00-18:00
Description: I was a radio DJ for 10 years and a resident DJ for 5 years in a wild Bucharest student club—throwing house, dubstep, DnB, and heavy tracks from 10 PM to 7 AM. Now I gently place smooth funky house rhythms into the minds and bodies of the crowd. Don't shy away!

Artist: SILENCE PATH
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Fri 18:00-20:00
Genre: Electronic / Ambient
Description: Silence Path is an electronic music project born from a passion for music. Its goal is to convey powerful emotions and create an authentic connection with the audience, offering a unique musical experience.

Artist: SILENT DISCIPLE
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Wed 19:00-21:00
Description: A turntablist, Twitcher, and YouTube curator, Silent Disciple fuses funk, vinyl, and live performance—proving the "silent d" doesn't mute the music.

Artist: SIMULA
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Sun 20:00-21:00 (Hosted by GQ)
Genre: Drum & Bass
Description: The energy merchant of the DnB scene, Simula specializes in peak-time anthems that turn any crowd into a bouncing mass. His jump-up selections are pure adrenaline—guaranteed to make even the most reserved raver lose control.

Artist: SIXTEE SECONDS
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Fri 04:30-06:30
Genre: House / Techno
Description: "Blending musical genres and eras seamlessly, Sixtee Seconds electrify with dynamic DJ sets. Merging house's timeless essence with cutting-edge techno, they ignite a new era—getting diverse-influenced dancers moving to an innovative rhythm."

Artist: SKELER
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Fri 02:15-03:25
Genre: Wave / Hardwave
Description: Skeler's sound is what would happen if Burial and Clams Casino had a baby... in Transylvania. Skeler blends trap rhythms, ethereal melodies, and enough reverb to drown in. His tracks sound like the soundtrack to a cyberpunk thriller set in Bucharest. Get ready for a glimpse into electronic music's moody future. 🖤

Artist: SOCOL
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Wed 20:00-22:00
Genre: Eclectic
Description: "The DJ's DJ"—Socol is revered for his versatile style and expertise behind the decks, earning him the nickname that speaks for itself.

Artist: SOFI TUKKER
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Thu 01:00-02:30
Genre: Dance Pop / House
Description: Turning Brazilian vibes into Grammy nods, streaming billions, and building the most positive community in dance music. When these best friends hit the stage, everyone's invited to the good time.

Artist: SOFIA KOURTESIS
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Thu 00:00-02:00
Description: Deep in Berlin's electronic scene, Sofia Kourtesis crafts spiritual house music straight from Lima's soul. Recording sounds from her hometown streets, she turns them into house tracks that hit right in the feels. Catch her set - thank us later.

Artist: SONJA MOONEAR B2B ANDREI CIUBUC
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Fri 04:00-09:00
Description: From classical training to Technics and machines, Sonja Moonear has built a career spanning over two decades as a DJ and producer with a reputation for discerning record selection and a flair for funky-leaning techno, trippy house, and high-grade beats. A key figure in the Geneva squat scene, minimal movement, Perlon label circle, and beyond, she co-founded Junction SM, performs worldwide, and runs the vinyl-only Ruta5 imprint. Known for her empathetic crowd connection and profound musical understanding, Sonja also works as a sound designer for Swiss national channel RTS and won the 2023 Swiss Prize for Music. // Andrei Ciubuc is one of the artists belonging to the new wave of Romanian underground minimal producers and DJs. Passionate since childhood, he developed a special relationship with music—starting analog on violin before expanding to guitar and bass guitar. Assisted by his experience as a sound engineer, he created his own label "Draganenii," imprinting a unique, easily recognizable style of versatility at every opportunity. Andrei is part of the trio "Backstage Boys" alongside Dan Andrei and Kozo, as well as the collaborative duos "VRAC" with Vlad Radu and "A_R" with Rhadoo.

Artist: SPARROW & BARBOSSA
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Sat 02:00-05:00
Genre: Caribbean House / Afro House
Description: Meet Caribbean House's founding fathers: Sparrow & Barbossa took Afro rhythms, island vibes, and pure groove science, then democratized the dancefloor. No passports needed for this journey 🌴

Artist: STASI SANLIN
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Wed 00:30-02:30
Genre: House / Techno
Description: Bucharest's techno sorceress casting spells on unsuspecting ravers. Stasi Sanlin's sets are a masterclass in tension and release, blending hypnotic minimal with peak-time bangers. Prepare for a journey into techno's deepest, darkest corners. 🕳️⚡️

Artist: SUB:LIMINAL
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Fri 15:30-16:30
Description: Underground Romanian talent bringing drum and bass bangers. Expect explosive dancefloor energy.

Artist: SUCIU
When/Where: STABLES STAGE - Sat 09:00-12:00
Genre: House / Techno / Dark
Description: Suciu balances moods and motifs like a tightrope walker, blending house, jazz, rap, and rock influences into dance-inducing sets. His groove-led productions dip into haunted atmospherics, creating individualized experiences.

Artist: SUGAR
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sat 20:00-22:00
Description: Cluj-Napoca's passionate selector and collector, Sugár curates vast, diverse vinyl sets that move heads and feet. Featured at Electric Castle, Jazz in the Park, TIFF, and through MeloMenuții (MeloMelanj duo with D'Jhu). Founder of MeloMelanj record store, he's a vital force in the local scene.

Artist: SVDDEN DEATH
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Fri 03:25-04:35
Genre: Dubstep / Riddim
Description: Bass music's masked menace bringing the apocalypse to Electric Castle. Svdden Death's brutal sound got dubstep, metal, and pure chaos into a sonic assault that'll rearrange your DNA. Prepare for the heaviest set of your life - earplugs are mandatory. 💀

Artist: SYLVIE KREUSCH
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sun 20:20-21:20
Genre: Art Pop / Alternative
Description: Belgium's dark pop enchantress casting spells on unsuspecting audiences. Sylvie Kreusch mixes sultry vocals, cinematic soundscapes, and enough charisma to fill ten stages. Part Lana Del Rey, part Nick Cave, all hypnotic. Prepare to be bewitched. 🖤

Artist: TAKING BACK AUGUST
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sun 14:00-14:50
Genre: Alternative Rock
Description: Cluj-Napoca's pop-punk heroes keeping the spirit of the 2000s alive. Taking Back August is hot for catchy hooks with raw emotion, creating anthems for a new generation of misfits. They channel the energy of Blink-182 and the passion of My Chemical Romance, with a distinctly Transylvanian twist. Get ready to scream along to lyrics you wish you'd written in high school. 🎤🤘

Artist: TARAPHONICS
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Sun 18:00-19:00
Genre: Folk Fusion / Contemporary
Description: Taraphonics reimagines Romanian lăutărească virtuosity with pop voices in a vibrant contemporary fusion. A bridge between generations, this will be Electric Castle’s first breath of folclor reinvented.

Artist: THE AMAZONS
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Fri 19:55-20:55
Genre: Alternative Rock
Description: When Reading's finest decided rock needed more ambition, The Amazons were born. Three albums of pure arena energy later, conquering the UK charts, they're still making speakers tremble and crowds believe. Not to be missed ⚡️

Artist: THE SCRATCH
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Thu 00:00-01:00
Genre: Metal / Folk Fusion
Description: Four lads turning traditional melodies into absolute mayhem. The Scratch blend metal chaos with folk soul, creating shows so wild they had to be seen to be believed. Dublin's worst-kept secret is about to blow up.

Artist: THE SISTERS OF MERCY
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Thu 23:40-00:40
Genre: Gothic Rock / Post-Punk
Description: Dark rock royalty since 1980, The Sisters of Mercy wrote the blueprint for gothic greatness. Andrew Eldritch and his faithful drum machine Doktor Avalanche turned post-punk into pure theater. Four decades later, they're still showing everyone how it's done.

Artist: TOESUP
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sun 21:00-22:00
Genre: House
Description: Known for TikTok remixes and viral edits, TOESUP delivers unexpected house mashups—keeping audiences on their toes with his creative selections.

Artist: TOTALLY SPICE
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Thu 18:00-20:00
Genre: Technopop / UK Garage / Psychedelia
Description: Totally Spice 🌶️💯 is a female duo storming Bucharest's scene with technopop love, UK garage from the heart, broken rave anthems, and pink psychedelia. They build a community focused on women, non-binary, and female-identified artists—where confidence, resilience, and unapologetic spirit converge.

Artist: UNGLUED + DEGS
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sat 04:00-05:00
Description: The moment Unglued touches a track, ravers know what's coming. UKF called him one to watch, The Wire got on board, and now Hospital Records locked him down. Catch his set before the secret gets too big to contain. // Some MCs rap, others sing - Degs does both with surgical precision. Switching between rapid-fire bars and soulful hooks, he just makes it look effortless. From freestyle heat on Hospital classics to creating summer classics, he's pure fire.

Artist: URBANDAWN + PVC
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Sat 05:00-06:00
Description: Classical training, Brazilian roots, and heavy Scandinavian metal shaped Urbandawn's distinctive sound. Now he's cooking up bangers that make both underground heads and mainstream crowds lose their minds. São Paulo's finest keeps leveling up.

Artist: VALERIA STOICA
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Thu 19:30-20:00
Genre: Indie Folk / Pop
Description: An indie-pop dreamer with a voice like a summer breeze. If Bon Iver and Florence had a love child, it'd sound something like this. With a voice that could melt glaciers, her music feels like wandering through a meadow at sunset—soft, soulful, and full of heart. Get ready to fall in love. 🌟

Artist: VANIIRII
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Thu 17:30-19:30
Genre: Electronic / Eclectic
Description: VAnIIRII discovered her passion for music through dance and choreography. Attending electronic music parties since 2011, she began mixing favorite tracks across genres. Her close connection to the VRTW crew opened new musical areas, now woven into her smooth, playful sets.

Artist: VLADEMIR
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Thu 22:00-00:00
Description: Local Dj. EXPECT GOOD HOUSE COMBINED WITH MELODIC TECHNO

Artist: VLADEMIR
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Thu 22:00-00:00
Description: Local underground favorite ready to showcase Romania's electronic talent. Expect techno and house that cuts deep.

Artist: VOLT
When/Where: HIDEOUT STAGE - Wed 22:30-00:30
Genre: House / Tech-House
Description: Greetings, I'm VOLT—30+ years in the industry. I've collaborated with Blanilla, Ndj, Manki (Ruffinaments), and played Electric Castle, MOX, The Sunsets, Untold, Double Rise. For four years I've also been resident DJ at Brener Social Club, shaping unforgettable parties.

Artist: VOLTAGE + INJA
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Fri 19:30-21:00
Description: A one-man musical hurricane. When Inja grabs the mic, expect poetry in motion. From Guardian columns to festival stages, he juggles bars, beats, and burning social issues while keeping the crowd bouncing. Hospital Records' secret weapon keeping drum & bass crowds spellbound worldwide.

Artist: WAX ON FRIDAYS
When/Where: THE BEACH STAGE - Sun 02:00-04:00
Genre: Vinyl-Only / Various Electronic
Description: A vinyl-only selector since '04, Wax on Fridays champions underground sounds—from shouting divas to comforting grooves—with a deep knowledge of the mighty 12" format.

Artist: WHITE MAHALA
When/Where: HANGAR STAGE - Fri 16:35-17:35
Genre: Balkan / Gypsy Punk
Description: The band that turns weddings into mosh pits. Bucharest's gypsy punk revolutionaries bringing Balkan madness to the 21st century. Think traditional Roma melodies with rock energy and hip-hop attitude. Their live shows are like a tour through Eastern Europe's wildest street parties. 🎺

Artist: WOOMB
When/Where: BACKYARD STAGE - Sun 19:30-20:30
Genre: Electronic / Experimental
Description: Woomb is the Bulgarian duo making waves across Europe with their genre-defying sound. With tracks like "Shape Yourself Around Me" and "Post War Lovemaking Machine," this Bulgarian duo is redefining Southeast Europe's alternative scene. Don't miss their Electric Castle debut. 🎶

Artist: YCS
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Sat 18:30-20:15
Genre: Ballroom / Reggaeton / Jersey Club / Gqom / House
Description: Bucharest-based YCS explores music's cultural dimensions in new club contexts. A ballroom culture devotee, her hot bouncy beats mix with reggaeton, jersey club, house, and gqom to keep dancefloors moving.

Artist: YUNGBLUD
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Sat 22:40-23:40
Genre: Alt-Rock / Pop-Punk
Description: The rockstar your parents warned you about. Yungblud mixes punk chaos, pop hooks, and raw vulnerability into anthems for the misfits. His live shows are pure adrenaline – think mosh pits, glitter, and a whole lot of feels. He's loud, he's unapologetic, and he's here to make you scream your heart out. 🖤

Artist: ZDA
When/Where: PING PONG STAGE - Fri 21:00-22:00
Genre: Eclectic / Mainstream meets Underground
Description: ZDA combines mainstream and underground—left popcorn TV for eclectic mixes. Always playful, she brings good vibes and makes crowds dance. It's all about the dance.

Artist: ZDOB ȘI ZDUB
When/Where: MAIN STAGE - Fri 18:00-19:00
Genre: Folk Punk / Rock
Description: Zdob și Zdub brings the Balkan party. From Chișinău basements to Eurovision stages, they're Moldova's folk-punk ambassadors who put Eastern European madness on the global map, blending traditional sounds with rock energy. Get ready for the wildest hora you've ever been part of. 🥁

Artist: ZO
When/Where: BOOHA STAGE - Sat 14:00-16:00
Genre: Hip-Hop / Dub / UK Garage / Drum & Bass
Description: Cluj-based promoter-turned-DJ ZO has pushed the local bass scene for seven years, booking acts like Loefah and Commodo. His dancefloor-oriented sets span hip-hop, dub, UK garage, and DnB, always delivering top-notch selection.

Here are all the stages:
Name: Main Stage by Coca-Cola. Description: Our biggest stage is where the most awaited artists perform. Here you can enjoy the most spectacular EC moments, sharing climax with thousands of people like you. Thrilling. Music: The most spectacular live shows and DJ sets.
Name: Hangar by BT. Description: Welcoming a mix of punks, ravers, artists, and music lovers from all walks of life. It's not just about partying; it's about connection, creativity, and shared energy. Music: Alternative & niche live acts and sophisticated DJ sets.
Name: Booha by glo. Description: This is where the party never stops. The iconic stage with an unforgettable industrial look is the first thing you bump into when you enter the festival. The programming spans various sub-genres, ensuring a rich and eclectic musical experience. Music: House, groovy house, bass, disco and melodic techno.
Name: Hideout by glo. Description: The crowd is typically a mix of jet-setters, bohemian travelers, spiritual seekers, and influencers. Attendees are drawn by EC's unique blend of natural beauty, music, and the opportunity to experience events that feel both exclusive and authentic. Music: Afro house, organic house & deep tribal house.
Name: The Beach Stage. Description: Underground and avant-garde artists rather than mainstream headliners, maintaining an authentic and niche appeal. Creates a more intimate atmosphere, ensuring high-quality sound and an engaged crowd. Lineups are carefully crafted to balance established legends with up-and-coming talents. Music: Caribbean sounds, funk, bossa breaks, trip hop, rare grooves, disco & boogie, northern soul & funk, soulful garage & liquid drum and bass or oriental sounds.
Name: Backyard Stage by E.ON. Description: The Backyard Stage is a soulful haven where authentic, inspiring sounds come alive. With its warm, intimate vibe, lush greenery, and fairy lights, it feels like a friend's garden, bringing people together through music and connection. Music: The globe’s vibrant musical tapestry is woven together - African rhythms, Latin grooves, Asian melodies, and European avant-garde.
Name: Ping Pong Stage by Burn. Description: The oldies but goldies hits we all love to hear once in while are at the Castle. Here you’ll involuntarily shake your body right from the first beat. Don’t say we didn’t warn ya. Music: Everyone’s guilty pleasures.
Name: Stables. Description: Designed to encapsulate the spirit of the festival, this underground club is a tribute to the origins of electronic music. Stables is the spot for those who love to party on electro and ro-minimal, Sunrise, till the morning light hits. Music: Ro-minimal, techno, microhouse.
Name: Camping Stage. Description: Get the sunshine and the good vibes. Now can match your morning coffee with the right music, starting from 12:00 PM, in the EC Village. Music: Fresh tunes to wake up your body and soul and surprise acoustic performances.

Q: Where can I download my EC ticket?
A: The ticket purchased for EC can only be downloaded from the EC account from which it was purchased, from My Account -> My Orders.

Q: I have the ticket in PDF format, but I can't find it in my EC account, is that okay?
A: If you already have it in PDF format and have all the data on it, then it's good to go .

Q: If I have a festival + Camping subscription, do I receive a tent from you?
A: If you have a festival pass that includes Camping, you can come with your own tent or purchase an accommodation structure from the site.

Q: I can't find any accommodation structures to purchase. Will they really no longer be available?
A: At the moment, the only available options for purchasing a tent can be found on the exchange, the ones on our website are sold out. From there you can purchase an accommodation structure, or you can opt to bring your own tent.

Q: I want to know more about what types of tents we can bring with us, can you tell me if there are any limitations?
A: There are no size limitations for personal tents. We recommend that festival-goers bring tents appropriate for the number of people who will be staying in them. Access with awnings of any type is not permitted.

Q: Where can I pitch my tent?
A: There will be a specially designated area for personal tents. Campsite volunteers will guide you to find a suitable spot to pitch your tent.

Q: Can I get a campsite for just 3 days of the festival?
A: Access to the Camping area is only allowed for festival season ticket holders, not day tickets. You can stay as long as you want in the Camping, until the end of the festival.

Q: What does Car Camping mean?
A: The Car Camping ticket allows one car to enter the camping area. In a 3x8 meter space, you will be able to park your car and pitch your personal tent. Only one Car Camping ticket is required, but all people in the car will need a festival pass and camping pass. A maximum of 5 people are allowed in the car.

Q: Is it okay if I exceed the 3x8 meter space?
A: We recommend that participants do not significantly exceed the lines drawn for each space. If the delimited spaces are exceeded, an additional space will be needed for the placement of tents and, implicitly, an additional Car Camping ticket.

Q: What does RV Camping mean?
A: The RV Camping ticket allows access to one RV/motorhome in the camping area. There will be a specially arranged area for RV parking. Only one RV Camping ticket is required, but all people who will be staying in this RV will need a festival subscription and camping pass. Details can be found here: https://electriccastle.ro/ec-village

Q: Do I need to buy a ticket for my 7-year-old son?
A: Minors up to and including 7 years old have free access throughout the festival, if accompanied by a parent/legal guardian who holds a valid season ticket. The adult accompanying the minor must complete the following declaration: https://electriccastle.ro/assets/docs/declaratie-minori-sub-16ani.pdf

Q: If I am 16 years old, can I come to the festival without being accompanied by a parent?
A: Minors between 16 and 18 years old can come to the festival unaccompanied. A parent/legal guardian will be required to complete the following declaration: https://electriccastle.ro/assets/docs/declaratie-minori-peste-16ani.pdf, which the minor must present upon entry to the festival.

Q: I purchased a ticket for my 7-year-old daughter, only then did I see that she has free access to the festival. Can I get a refund?
A: Hello! We understand the situation, but tickets already purchased are not refundable, according to EC regulations.

Q: How can I change the data on a ticket?
A: Through our Exchange platform, you can change the data on an EC ticket. The data can only be changed from the EC account to which the ticket belongs, and an exchange fee is charged for this change, as communicated in the EC general regulations.

Q: I can't make it to the festival and I can't sell my ticket. Can I get my money back?
A: Once purchased on the EC website, tickets and subscriptions are non-refundable. According to the regulations, purchased tickets cannot be replaced, and their value can only be refunded through the Exchange Platform, according to the provisions of III.3. You can sell your tickets to people interested in participating in the EC, exclusively using the Exchange platform. You can also find out how the platform works in the regulations.

Q: Could I change the dates or sell a Youth Pass 21 ticket?
A: The Youth Pass 21 ticket cannot be sold or offered to another person, according to the regulations: https://electriccastle.ro/youth-pass-21

Q: I purchased a Car Camping ticket, but we will be staying at a hotel after all. Can I get my money back for the Car Camping ticket?
A: For this, we make our Exchange platform available, this being the only option available for tickets, structures or facilities already purchased.

Q: How do I know that I will receive my ticket purchased through Exchange?
A: According to the regulations, any transaction regarding tickets within the Exchange Platform will be made strictly between the ticket holder and the buyer, EC not having the quality of an intermediary or party in the understanding and/or transaction of the parties. You must ensure that the seller has followed all the steps in the instructions and has finally pressed the Send to buyer button.

Q: How does the Exchange platform work, what steps need to be followed?
A: Here you can find how the Exchange platform works: [link needed] Through the platform, transfer the ticket to another person. When the seller generates the exchange link, the buyer accesses it and will have the opportunity to modify the data on the ticket, paying the processing fee (15 euros). Even if the ticket still remains in the seller's account, it will have the nominal data on it, the seller having to press the SEND TO BUYER button, for the transfer to be completed, and the ticket to reach the buyer's account. In this way, the respective seller will not be able to transfer the same ticket more than once, to multiple accounts, but only once, to a single account, that of the buyer. The tickets are nominal, so as long as the name and address on the ticket do not match those of the person who will actually use the ticket at the festival, that person will not be able to enter the festival. If you ever have an unpleasant experience with a seller on the platform, just send us an email and let us know, and we will try to help you as soon as possible.
